home.heroSubtitle: SOPHYS LAW FIRM provides legal advisory, non-litigation representation, and dispute resolution for individuals, businesses, and domestic and international investors.
home.beyondLawImageAlt: SOPHYS Beyond Law philosophy — legal insight connected to business strategy
home.beyondLawDesc: SOPHYS looks beyond regulations alone, placing every legal matter within the context of business, development goals, and clients' long-term interests — delivering practical, effective, and sustainable solutions.
home.besideYouImageAlt: SOPHYS Beside You philosophy — trusted legal partnership and ongoing counsel
home.besideYouDesc: SOPHYS stands beside clients at every stage, from important business decisions to difficult times, crises, or disputes — with a spirit of listening, understanding, and protecting clients' legitimate interests.
home.practiceSubtitle: Comprehensive legal services for businesses, investors, and individuals.
home.clientsSubtitle: SOPHYS LAW FIRM serves businesses, investors, and individuals who need legal support in investment, business operations, transactions, and dispute resolution in Vietnam.
home.newsSubtitle: Legal analysis and updates in FDI, customs, projects, and corporate law.
home.processSubtitle: A clear, transparent workflow — ensuring clients always understand progress and outcomes.

step1.title: Initial Consultation
step1.desc: Listen to your needs, analyze the situation, and propose an appropriate approach.

step2.title: Legal Analysis
step2.desc: Research regulations, assess risks, and develop a detailed strategy.

step3.title: Implementation
step3.desc: Draft documents, represent in negotiations or litigation per the agreed plan.

step4.title: Follow-up & Support
step4.desc: Report results, provide post-matter advisory, and long-term legal partnership.

home.ctaSubtitle: Schedule a consultation with our legal team — we are ready to partner with you.

about.title: About SOPHYS LAW FIRM
about.subtitle: BEYOND LAW. BESIDE YOU.
about.intro: SOPHYS LAW FIRM provides advisory, non-litigation representation, and dispute resolution for individuals, businesses, and domestic and international investors.
about.scope: From investment and company formation, internal governance, and commercial transactions to projects and disputes.
about.beyondLawDesc: SOPHYS understands that every legal matter is connected to business operations, investment decisions, and clients' development goals. We go beyond legal opinions to partner in risk management, project implementation, dispute resolution, and building practical, effective, and sustainable solutions.
about.besideYouDesc: SOPHYS believes a skilled lawyer is not only an advisor, but a trusted partner. We stand beside clients at every stage of growth — from critical business decisions to difficult, crisis, or dispute situations — with a spirit of listening, understanding, and protecting clients' legitimate interests.
about.valuesDesc: We build long-term partnerships with clients on the foundation of integrity, responsibility, and solid expertise, creating synergies to effectively resolve legal and business challenges.

partnership.title: Partnership
partnership.subtitle: Long-term companionship
partnership.desc: We build enduring relationships with clients, placing their legitimate interests and development goals at the center of everything we do.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.subtitle: Principled and ethical
integrity.desc: SOPHYS upholds honesty, confidentiality, accountability, and professional standards in every legal opinion we deliver.

synergy.title: Synergy
synergy.subtitle: Effective collaboration
synergy.desc: We combine multidisciplinary expertise and close coordination to deliver comprehensive solutions that go beyond isolated legal advice.

about.clientsClosing: SOPHYS strives to be a trusted legal partner, accompanying clients in risk management, problem-solving, and sustainable development.
